examples: Last week, for example, Postmaster General Pat Donahoe announced plans to stop mall delivery on Saturdays, a move he says could save $3 billion annually.
Last week, for example, Postmaster General Pat Donahoe announced plans to stop mail delivery on Saturdays, a move he says could save $3 billion annually.
An instance is started by executing the Postmaster process (pg_ctl).
The job used to go to a different Cabinet officer -- the postmaster general.
Lyndon's Johnson's postmaster general was Larry O'Brien, who managed the 1960 and 1964 presidential campaigns.
